{{ define "main" }}
  1. {{ i18n "vendors" | default "Vendors" }}
    2. {{ with .Parent }}
  2. {{ .Title }}
    3. {{ end }}
  3. {{ .Title }}
{{ with .Params.image }} {{ end }}

{{ .Title }}

{{ with .Params.city }}{{ . }}{{ end }}{{ with .Params.region }}, {{ . }}{{ end }}{{ with .Params.country }} — {{ . }}{{ end }}

{{ if or .Params.rating .Params.reviews }}
{{ with .Params.rating }} {{ $rating := . }} {{ range seq 5 }} {{ if le . (int $rating) }}★{{ else }}☆{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ . }} {{ end }} {{ with .Params.reviews }} ({{ . }} {{ i18n "reviews" | default "reviews" }}) {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ with .Params.price }}

{{ . }}

{{ end }}
{{ i18n "vendor_contact" | default "Contact Vendor" }} {{ with .Params.website }} {{ i18n "vendor_website" | default "Visit Website" }} {{ end }}
{{ if .Content }}

{{ i18n "vendor_about" | default "About" }}

{{ .Content }}
{{ end }} {{ with .Params.services }}

{{ i18n "vendor_services" | default "Services" }}

    {{ range . }}
  • {{ . }}
    • {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ with .Params.gallery }}

{{ i18n "vendor_gallery" | default "Gallery" }}

{{ range . }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ with .Params.faq }}

{{ i18n "vendor_faq" | default "Frequently Asked Questions" }}

{{ range . }}

{{ .answer }}

{{ end }}
{{ end }}

{{ i18n "vendor_cta_title" | default "Are you a wedding vendor?" }}

{{ i18n "vendor_cta_text" | default "Join EventSnap and connect with couples planning their perfect day." }}

{{ i18n "vendor_cta_button" | default "Get Listed" }}
{{ end }}
